title: 4 Industrial Services Stocks to Watch Amid Supply Chain Woes
text: Despite the ongoing momentum in manufacturing activity, supply chain headwinds and higher costs mar the near-term outlook for the Zacks Industrial Services industry. The likes of ASHTY, GWW, SITE and SCSC will gain from their ongoing focus on enhancing digital capabilities.

title: 4 GARP Stocks for a Winning Portfolio
text: Growth at a reasonable price or GARP strategy helps investors gain exposure to stocks that have impressive prospects and are trading at a discount.

title: A Trio of Stocks With High Returns on Equity
text: When a company's return on equity ratio is superior to most of its competitors, it generally indicates the company has been very efficient in generating profits. Thus, investors may want to consider the following stocks since they are performing better than most of their peer group companies in terms of a higher ROE ratio.

title: Grainger (GWW) Earnings & Sales Beat Estimates in Q4, Up Y/Y
text: Grainger's (GWW) Q4 top line gains on strong performance across the High-Touch Solutions North America (N.A.) and Endless Assortment segments.

title: W.W. Grainger (GWW) Tops Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: W.W. Grainger (GWW) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 3.62% and 2.43%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Blue Chip W.W. Grainger Confirms Trend On Strong Outlook
text: W.W. Grainger (NYSE: GWW) is a highly-valued stock but you get a lot for what you pay for. Trading at 25.5X its forward earnings estimate it is well above the broad market average but this is a blue-chip stock we're talking about, and one that is not only growing revenue but widening margins, producing strong earnings, and guiding the outlook for 2022 well above the Marketbeat.com consensus estimates.

title: Why W.W. Grainger (GWW) Might Surprise This Earnings Season
text: W.W. Grainger (GWW) is seeing favorable earnings estimate revision activity and has a positive Zacks Earnings ESP heading into earnings season.
